findings.description: Section content is "なし" (2 characters), which is below the 50-character threshold. The source document contains an introductory sentence ("本章では、Nablarchの提供するMavenアーキタイプの構成と、各ディレクトリ・ファイルの概要を記載する。") that was omitted, leaving the section body as a placeholder.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST document header: "本章では、Nablarchの提供するMavenアーキタイプの構成と、各ディレクトリ・ファイルの概要を記載する。"

findings.description: Hint `firstStepBatchEEProjectStructure` is missing. The source defines the RST cross-reference anchor `.. _firstStepBatchEEProjectStructure:` immediately before the pj-batch-ee "プロジェクトの構成" section, making it a navigation target for other documents. The equivalent label for pj-batch-dbless (`firstStepDbLessBatchProjectStructure`) is correctly included in s13's hints, so this is an inconsistency.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: `.. _firstStepBatchEEProjectStructure:` defined before pj-batch-ee プロジェクトの構成 section

findings.description: Hint `firstStepBatchProjectStructure` is missing. The source defines the RST cross-reference anchor `.. _firstStepBatchProjectStructure:` immediately before the pj-batch "プロジェクトの構成" section. This label is explicitly referenced in s13's section content (`:ref:`pj-batchプロジェクトの構成 <firstStepBatchProjectStructure>``), so users searching for this identifier would benefit from it being present as a hint in s11.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: `.. _firstStepBatchProjectStructure:` defined before pj-batch プロジェクトの構成 section; referenced in pj-batch-dbless section as cross-reference target
